title: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) Faces Minor Decline as Meme Token Maintains Top 100 Position
excerpt: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) experiences a 2.31% dip in the past 24 hours, trading at approximately $0.0083626. Despite the recent decline, the NFT-backed meme token continues to hold its position within the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.
